query: SELECT dogId, imageUrl IS NOT NULL as hasPhoto1, releasePhotoUrl IS NOT NULL as hasPhoto3, LEFT(releasePhotoUrl, 60) as photo3Preview FROM dog_records WHERE dogId = '20260312-001' LIMIT 1;
